---
title: "About"
image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/108618401
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 12em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/life00
---

Hi, I'm Ivan. I work at the intersection of finance and data science.

<div style="text-align: left; max-width: 450px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 2;">

**Skills:** Python, SQL, Git, Linux, Neovim, _and more..._

**Focus:** Quantitative Research, Predictive Modeling & ML

**Goal:** Advancing a career in **quantitative finance** 🚀

</div>
